<script>
    // Load results
    async function loadResults() {
      await checkAuth();
      setupUserMenu();

      const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
      const sessionId = urlParams.get('session');
      const assessmentId = urlParams.get('id');

      if (!sessionId && !assessmentId) {
        alert('No results found');
        window.location.href = '/skill-assessments.html';
        return;
      }

      try {
        let result;

        // Try dedicated session endpoint first (faster, more reliable)
        if (sessionId) {
          const sessionRes = await fetch(`/api/assessments/session/${sessionId}`, {
            headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('rekrutai_token')}` }
          });
          if (sessionRes.ok) {
            const sessionData = await sessionRes.json();
            result = sessionData.result;
          }
        }

        // Fallback: search through all results
        if (!result) {
          const response = await fetch('/api/assessments/results', {
            headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('rekrutai_token')}` }
          });

          if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load results');

          const data = await response.json();

          if (assessmentId) {
            result = data.results.find(r => r.id === parseInt(assessmentId));
          } else if (sessionId) {
            result = data.results.find(r => r.session_id === parseInt(sessionId));
          }
          if (!result) {
            result = data.results[0]; // fallback to most recent
          }
        }

        if (!result) {
          throw new Error('Result not found');
        }

        displayResults(result);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading results:', error);
        document.getElementById('result-status').textContent = 'Error Loading Results';
        document.getElementById('result-subtitle').textContent = 'Please try again';
      }
    }

    // Load results
    async function loadResults() {
      await checkAuth();
      await loadUserInfo();

      const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
      const sessionId = urlParams.get('session');
      const assessmentId = urlParams.get('id');

      if (!sessionId && !assessmentId) {
        alert('No results found');
        window.location.href = '/skill-assessments.html';
        return;
      }

      try {
        // For now, we'll fetch session data from the results endpoint
        // In a complete implementation, you'd have a dedicated session endpoint
        const response = await fetch('/api/assessments/results', {
          headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('rekrutai_token')}` }
        });

        if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load results');

        const data = await response.json();
        
        // Find the correct result based on available params
        let result;
        if (assessmentId) {
          result = data.results.find(r => r.id === parseInt(assessmentId));
        } else if (sessionId) {
          result = data.results.find(r => r.session_id === parseInt(sessionId));
        }
        if (!result) {
          result = data.results[0]; // fallback to most recent
        }

        if (!result) {
          throw new Error('Result not found');
        }

        displayResults(result);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading results:', error);
        document.getElementById('result-status').textContent = 'Error Loading Results';
        document.getElementById('result-subtitle').textContent = 'Please try again';
      }
    }

<script>
    // Load results
    async function loadResults() {
      await checkAuth();
      setupUserMenu();

      const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
      const sessionId = urlParams.get('session');
      const assessmentId = urlParams.get('id');

      if (!sessionId && !assessmentId) {
        alert('No results found');
        window.location.href = '/skill-assessments.html';
        return;
      }

      try {
        let result;

        // Try dedicated session endpoint first (faster, more reliable)
        if (sessionId) {
          const sessionRes = await fetch(`/api/assessments/session/${sessionId}`, {
            headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('rekrutai_token')}` }
          });
          if (sessionRes.ok) {
            const sessionData = await sessionRes.json();
            result = sessionData.result;
          }
        }

        // Fallback: search through all results
        if (!result) {
          const response = await fetch('/api/assessments/results', {
            headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('rekrutai_token')}` }
          });

          if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load results');

          const data = await response.json();

          if (assessmentId) {
            result = data.results.find(r => r.id === parseInt(assessmentId));
          } else if (sessionId) {
            result = data.results.find(r => r.session_id === parseInt(sessionId));
          }
          if (!result) {
            result = data.results[0]; // fallback to most recent
          }
        }

        if (!result) {
          throw new Error('Result not found');
        }

        displayResults(result);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading results:', error);
        document.getElementById('result-status').textContent = 'Error Loading Results';
        document.getElementById('result-subtitle').textContent = 'Please try again';
      }
    }
